input.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add automatic entity enrichment and architect agent infrastructure

Implements automatic vector-based entity enrichment in chat context, architect subagent for technical design, and question tracking infrastructure. Adds embedding-based entity retrieval to buildChatContext for semantic matching against workspace entities, architect agent with design review tools, and SurrealDB schema migration for question/answer tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.thinking: Perfect! Now I have a clear picture of all the changes. Let me create the PR using `gh pr create`. The title should be under 80 characters and the description under 5 sentences.

input.command:
gh pr create --base main --title "Add automatic entity enrichment and architect agent" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
Implements automatic vector-based entity enrichment in chat context by leveraging existing embedding infrastructure (searchEntitiesByEmbedding function and HNSW indexes). Adds architect subagent for technical design review with composition of shared chat tools. Introduces SurrealDB schema migration for question/answer tracking to support architect-generated design guidance. Chat context now automatically loads relevant entities via semantic similarity search without requiring explicit tool invocation. Includes unit tests validating architect agent behavior and question answer extraction.

💡 Generated with Claude Code
EOF
)"
input.description: Create PR on main branch with title and description
